title: Oportun Financial Corporation (OPRT) Q3 Earnings Preview
text: The market anticipates Oportun will report a year-over-year earnings decline alongside revenue growth when releasing Q3 2022 results on November 7, 2022. Quarterly loss expected: $0.12 per share (representing a -115.4% year-over-year change). Revenue projection: $241.89 million (up 52% from the prior-year quarter). The consensus EPS estimate has been revised downward by 8% over the preceding 30 days. Earnings Surprise Prediction (ESP): -25%. This negative ESP, combined with the company's Zacks Rank of #4, makes it difficult to conclusively predict that Oportun Financial Corporation will beat the consensus EPS estimate. The company has demonstrated strong earnings beat capability, exceeding consensus estimates in all four of the most recent quarters. In the last reported period, Oportun delivered earnings of $0.11 per share against expectations of $0.07, producing a +57.14% surprise. Oportun Financial Corporation doesn't appear a compelling earnings-beat candidate, though investors should consider additional factors beyond earnings expectations.
